query: You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository. The codebase is at version 2.186 (commit: a854e93b). ## Issue to Resolve [Bug] AnkiDroidJS API returns incorrect data type ###### Reproduction Steps 1. Add a new basic type note. 2. Add the following code in the front template of the note: ```html api.ankiGetCardQueue() return value type: {{Front}} ``` 3. Study the new card in AnkiDroid. ###### Expected Result According to the `AnkiDroid Javascript API wiki`, the return value type of api.ankiGetCardQueue() is [`int`](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/AnkiDroid-Javascript-API#type-of-return-value-17). Therefore, it should display `api.ankiGetCardQueue() return value type: int` on the front of the card. ###### Actual Result It displays `api.ankiGetCardQueue() return value type: string` in the front of the card. ###### Debug info ``` AnkiDroid Version = 2.17.5 (1c1aa94ec466f37d33fd2f75020d9f9021ac811e) Backend Version = 0.1.34-anki23.12.1 (23.12.1 1a1d4d5419c6b57ef3baf99c9d2d9cf85d36ae0a) Android Version = 10 (SDK 29) ProductFlavor = full Manufacturer = HUAWEI Model = MXW-AN00 Hardware = mt6873 Webview User Agent = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; MXW-AN00 Build/HONORMXW-AN00; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/92.0.4515.105 Mobile Safari/537.36 ACRA UUID = 82400b65-bd87-4883-a1f6-b911150f725b Crash Reports Enabled = true ``` ###### Research *Enter an [x] character to confirm the points below:* - [x] I have read the [support page](https://ankidroid.org/docs/help.html) and am reporting a bug or enhancement request specific to AnkiDroid - [x] I have checked the [manual](https://ankidroid.org/docs/manual.html) and the [FAQ](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/FAQ) and could not find a solution to my issue - [x] I have searched for similar existing issues here and on the user forum - [x] (Optional) I have confirmed the issue is not resolved in the latest alpha release ([instructions](https://docs.ankidroid.org/manual.html#betaTesting)) ## Additional Context from Issue Discussion Based on the AnkiDroidJS API wiki, almost every API that was expected to return data of type int, long, or boolean, is actually returning data of type string. I will push the fix which return correct data types. ## Relevant Files The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue: - `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/AnkiDroidJsAPI.kt` ## Instructions Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above. Focus on: - Understanding the root cause of the issue - Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem - Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality ## Important Evaluation Notes **Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing. **If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files ## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS **NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 19â†’
 20â†’package com.ichi2.anki
 21â†’
 22â†’import android.content.Context
 23â†’import android.content.Intent
 24â†’import android.net.Uri
 25â†’import androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope
 26â†’import com.github.zafarkhaja.semver.Version
 27â†’import com.google.android.material.snackbar.Snackbar
 28â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeBuryCard
 29â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeBuryNote
 30â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeError
 31â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeFlagCard
 32â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeMarkCard
 33â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeSetDue
 34â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeSuspendCard
 35â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeSuspendNote
 36â†’import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.flagCommands
 37â†’import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 38â†’import com.ichi2.anki.model.CardsOrNotes
 39â†’import com.ichi2.anki.servicelayer.rescheduleCards
 40â†’import com.ichi2.anki.servicelayer.resetCards
 41â†’import com.ichi2.anki.snackbar.setMaxLines
 42â†’import com.ichi2.anki.snackbar.showSnackbar
 43â†’import com.ichi2.libanki.Card
 44â†’import com.ichi2.libanki.Collection
 45â†’import com.ichi2.libanki.Decks
 46â†’import com.ichi2.libanki.SortOrder
 47â†’import com.ichi2.utils.NetworkUtils
 48â†’import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
 49â†’import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 50â†’import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
 51â†’import kotlinx.serialization.builtins.ListSerializer
 52â†’import kotlinx.serialization.builtins.serializer
 53â†’import kotlinx.serialization.json.Json
 54â†’import org.json.JSONException
 55â†’import org.json.JSONObject
 56â†’import timber.log.Timber
 57â†’
 58â†’open class AnkiDroidJsAPI(private val activity: AbstractFlashcardViewer) {
 59â†’    private val currentCard: Card
 60â†’        get() = activity.currentCard!!
 61â†’
 62â†’    private val getColUnsafe: Collection
 63â†’        get() = activity.getColUnsafe
 64â†’
 65â†’    /**
 66â†’     Javascript Interface class for calling Java function from AnkiDroid WebView
 67â†’     see js-api.js for available functions
 68â†’     */
 69â†’
 70â†’    private val context: Context = activity
 71â†’
 72â†’    // Text to speech
 73â†’    private val talker = JavaScriptTTS()
 74â†’
 75â†’    // Speech to Text
 76â†’    private val speechRecognizer = JavaScriptSTT(context)
 77â†’
 78â†’    open fun convertToByteArray(apiContract: ApiContract, boolean: Boolean): ByteArray {
 79â†’        return ApiResult(apiContract.isValid, boolean.toString()).toString().toByteArray()
 80â†’    }
 81â†’
 82â†’    open fun convertToByteArray(apiContract: ApiContract, int: Int): ByteArray {
 83â†’        return ApiResult(apiContract.isValid, int.toString()).toString().toByteArray()
 84â†’    }
 85â†’
 86â†’    open fun convertToByteArray(apiContract: ApiContract, long: Long): ByteArray {
 87â†’        return ApiResult(apiContract.isValid, long.toString()).toString().toByteArray()
 88â†’    }
 89â†’
 90â†’    open fun convertToByteArray(apiContract: ApiContract, string: String): ByteArray {
 91â†’        return ApiResult(apiContract.isValid, string).toString().toByteArray()
 92â†’    }
 93â†’
 94â†’    /**
 95â†’     * The method parse json data and return api contract object
 96â†’     * @param byteArray
 97â†’     * @return apiContract or null
 98â†’     */
 99â†’    private fun parseJsApiContract(byteArray: ByteArray): ApiContract? {
100â†’        try {
101â†’            val data = JSONObject(byteArray.decodeToString())
102â†’            val cardSuppliedApiVersion = data.optString("version", "")
103â†’            val cardSuppliedDeveloperContact = data.optString("developer", "")
104â†’            val cardSuppliedData = data.optString("data", "")
105â†’            val isValid = requireApiVersion(cardSuppliedApiVersion, cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
106â†’            return ApiContract(isValid, cardSuppliedDeveloperContact, cardSuppliedData)
107â†’        } catch (j: JSONException) {
108â†’            Timber.w(j)
109â†’            activity.runOnUiThread {
110â†’                activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.invalid_json_data, j.localizedMessage))
111â†’            }
112â†’        }
113â†’        return null
114â†’    }
115â†’
116â†’    /*
117â†’     * see 02-strings.xml
118â†’     * Show Error code when mark card or flag card unsupported
119â†’     * 1 - mark card
120â†’     * 2 - flag card
121â†’     *
122â†’     * show developer contact if js api used in card is deprecated
123â†’     */
124â†’    private fun showDeveloperContact(errorCode: Int, apiDevContact: String) {
125â†’        val errorMsg: String = context.getString(R.string.anki_js_error_code, errorCode)
126â†’        val snackbarMsg: String = context.getString(R.string.api_version_developer_contact, apiDevContact, errorMsg)
127â†’
128â†’        activity.showSnackbar(snackbarMsg, Snackbar.LENGTH_INDEFINITE) {
129â†’            setMaxLines(3)
130â†’            setAction(R.string.reviewer_invalid_api_version_visit_documentation) {
131â†’                activity.openUrl(Uri.parse("https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki"))
132â†’            }
133â†’        }
134â†’    }
135â†’
136â†’    /**
137â†’     * Supplied api version must be equal to current api version to call mark card, toggle flag functions etc.
138â†’     */
139â†’    private fun requireApiVersion(apiVer: String, apiDevContact: String): Boolean {
140â†’        try {
141â†’            if (apiDevContact.isEmpty() || apiVer.isEmpty()) {
142â†’                activity.runOnUiThread {
143â†’                    activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.invalid_json_data, ""))
144â†’                }
145â†’                return false
146â†’            }
147â†’            val versionCurrent = Version.parse(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.sCurrentJsApiVersion)
148â†’            val versionSupplied = Version.parse(apiVer)
149â†’
150â†’            /*
151â†’            * if api major version equals to supplied major version then return true and also check for minor version and patch version
152â†’            * show toast for update and contact developer if need updates
153â†’            * otherwise return false
154â†’            */
155â†’            return when {
156â†’                versionSupplied == versionCurrent -> {
157â†’                    true
158â†’                }
159â†’                versionSupplied.isLowerThan(versionCurrent) -> {
160â†’                    activity.runOnUiThread {
161â†’                        activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.update_js_api_version, apiDevContact))
162â†’                    }
163â†’                    versionSupplied.isHigherThanOrEquivalentTo(Version.parse(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.sMinimumJsApiVersion))
164â†’                }
165â†’                else -> {
166â†’                    activity.runOnUiThread {
167â†’                        activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.valid_js_api_version, apiDevContact))
168â†’                    }
169â†’                    false
170â†’                }
171â†’            }
172â†’        } catch (e: Exception) {
173â†’            Timber.w(e, "requireApiVersion::exception")
174â†’        }
175â†’        return false
176â†’    }
177â†’
178â†’    /**
179â†’     * Handle js api request,
180â†’     * some of the methods are overridden in Reviewer.kt and default values are returned.
181â†’     * @param methodName
182â†’     * @param bytes
183â†’     * @param returnDefaultValues `true` if default values should be returned (if non-[Reviewer])
184â†’     * @return
185â†’     */
186â†’    open suspend fun handleJsApiRequest(methodName: String, bytes: ByteArray, returnDefaultValues: Boolean = true) = withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
187â†’        // the method will call to set the card supplied data and is valid version for each api request
188â†’        val apiContract = parseJsApiContract(bytes)!!
189â†’        // if api not init or is api not called from reviewer then return default -1
190â†’        // also other action will not be modified
191â†’        if (!apiContract.isValid or returnDefaultValues) {
192â†’            return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, -1)
193â†’        }
194â†’
195â†’        val cardDataForJsAPI = activity.getCardDataForJsApi()
196â†’        val apiParams = apiContract.cardSuppliedData
197â†’
198â†’        return@withContext when (methodName) {
199â†’            "init" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
200â†’            "newCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.newCardCount)
201â†’            "lrnCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.lrnCardCount)
202â†’            "revCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.revCardCount)
203â†’            "eta" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.eta)
204â†’            "nextTime1" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime1)
205â†’            "nextTime2" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime2)
206â†’            "nextTime3" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime3)
207â†’            "nextTime4" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime4)
208â†’            "toggleFlag" -> {
209â†’                if (apiParams !in flagCommands) {
210â†’                    showDeveloperContact(ankiJsErrorCodeFlagCard, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
211â†’                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
212â†’                }
213â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.executeCommand(flagCommands[apiParams]!!))
214â†’            }
215â†’            "markCard" -> processAction({ activity.executeCommand(ViewerCommand.MARK) }, apiContract, ankiJsErrorCodeMarkCard, ::convertToByteArray)
216â†’            "buryCard" -> processAction(activity::buryCard, apiContract, ankiJsErrorCodeBuryCard, ::convertToByteArray)
217â†’            "buryNote" -> processAction(activity::buryNote, apiContract, ankiJsErrorCodeBuryNote, ::convertToByteArray)
218â†’            "suspendCard" -> processAction(activity::suspendCard, apiContract, ankiJsErrorCodeSuspendCard, ::convertToByteArray)
219â†’            "suspendNote" -> processAction(activity::suspendNote, apiContract, ankiJsErrorCodeSuspendNote, ::convertToByteArray)
220â†’            "setCardDue" -> {
221â†’                try {
222â†’                    val days = apiParams.toInt()
223â†’                    if (days < 0 || days > 9999) {
224â†’                        showDeveloperContact(ankiJsErrorCodeSetDue, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
225â†’                        return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
226â†’                    }
227â†’                    activity.launchCatchingTask {
228â†’                        activity.rescheduleCards(listOf(currentCard.id), days)
229â†’                    }
230â†’                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
231â†’                } catch (e: NumberFormatException) {
232â†’                    showDeveloperContact(ankiJsErrorCodeSetDue, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
233â†’                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
234â†’                }
235â†’            }
236â†’            "resetProgress" -> {
237â†’                val cardIds = listOf(currentCard.id)
238â†’                activity.launchCatchingTask { activity.resetCards(cardIds) }
239â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
240â†’            }
241â†’            "cardMark" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.note(getColUnsafe).hasTag(getColUnsafe, "marked"))
242â†’            "cardFlag" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.userFlag())
243â†’            "cardReps" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.reps)
244â†’            "cardInterval" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.ivl)
245â†’            "cardFactor" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.factor)
246â†’            "cardMod" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.mod)
247â†’            "cardId" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.id)
248â†’            "cardNid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.nid)
249â†’            "cardType" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.type)
250â†’            "cardDid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.did)
251â†’            "cardLeft" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.left)
252â†’            "cardODid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.oDid)
253â†’            "cardODue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.oDue)
254â†’            "cardQueue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.queue)
255â†’            "cardLapses" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.lapses)
256â†’            "cardDue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.due)
257â†’            "deckName" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, Decks.basename(activity.getColUnsafe.decks.name(currentCard.did)))
258â†’            "isActiveNetworkMetered" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, NetworkUtils.isActiveNetworkMetered())
259â†’            "ttsSetLanguage" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.setLanguage(apiParams))
260â†’            "ttsSpeak" -> {
261â†’                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
262â†’                val text = jsonObject.getString("text")
263â†’                val queueMode = jsonObject.getInt("queueMode")
264â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.speak(text, queueMode))
265â†’            }
266â†’            "ttsIsSpeaking" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.isSpeaking)
267â†’            "ttsSetPitch" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.setPitch(apiParams.toFloat()))
268â†’            "ttsSetSpeechRate" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.setSpeechRate(apiParams.toFloat()))
269â†’            "ttsFieldModifierIsAvailable" -> {
270â†’                // Know if {{tts}} is supported - issue #10443
271â†’                // Return false for now
272â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
273â†’            }
274â†’            "ttsStop" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.stop())
275â†’            "searchCard" -> {
276â†’                val intent = Intent(context, CardBrowser::class.java).apply {
277â†’                    putExtra("currentCard", currentCard.id)
278â†’                    putExtra("search_query", apiParams)
279â†’                }
280â†’                activity.startActivity(intent)
281â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
282â†’            }
283â†’            "searchCardWithCallback" -> ankiSearchCardWithCallback(apiContract)
284â†’            "isDisplayingAnswer" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.isDisplayingAnswer)
285â†’            "addTagToCard" -> {
286â†’                activity.runOnUiThread { activity.showTagsDialog() }
287â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
288â†’            }
289â†’            "isInFullscreen" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.isFullscreen)
290â†’            "isTopbarShown" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.prefShowTopbar)
291â†’            "isInNightMode" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.isInNightMode)
292â†’            "enableHorizontalScrollbar" -> {
293â†’                activity.webView!!.isHorizontalScrollBarEnabled = apiParams.toBoolean()
294â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
295â†’            }
296â†’            "enableVerticalScrollbar" -> {
297â†’                activity.webView!!.isVerticalScrollBarEnabled = apiParams.toBoolean()
298â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
299â†’            }
300â†’            "showNavigationDrawer" -> {
301â†’                activity.onNavigationPressed()
302â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
303â†’            }
304â†’            "showOptionsMenu" -> {
305â†’                activity.openOptionsMenu()
306â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
307â†’            }
308â†’            "showToast" -> {
309â†’                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
310â†’                val text = jsonObject.getString("text")
311â†’                val shortLength = jsonObject.optBoolean("shortLength", true)
312â†’                val msgDecode = activity.decodeUrl(text)
313â†’                UIUtils.showThemedToast(context, msgDecode, shortLength)
314â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
315â†’            }
316â†’            "showAnswer" -> {
317â†’                activity.displayCardAnswer()
318â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
319â†’            }
320â†’            "answerEase1" -> {
321â†’                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(AbstractFlashcardViewer.EASE_1)
322â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
323â†’            }
324â†’            "answerEase2" -> {
325â†’                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(AbstractFlashcardViewer.EASE_2)
326â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
327â†’            }
328â†’            "answerEase3" -> {
329â†’                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(AbstractFlashcardViewer.EASE_3)
330â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
331â†’            }
332â†’            "answerEase4" -> {
333â†’                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(AbstractFlashcardViewer.EASE_4)
334â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
335â†’            }
336â†’            "sttSetLanguage" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.setLanguage(apiParams))
337â†’            "sttStart" -> {
338â†’                val callback = object : JavaScriptSTT.SpeechRecognitionCallback {
339â†’                    override fun onResult(results: List<String>) {
340â†’                        activity.lifecycleScope.launch {
341â†’                            val apiResult = ApiResult(true, Json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(String.serializer()), results))
342â†’                            val jsonEncodedString = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) { JSONObject.quote(apiResult.toString()) }
343â†’                            activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSttResult($jsonEncodedString)", null)
344â†’                        }
345â†’                    }
346â†’                    override fun onError(errorMessage: String) {
347â†’                        activity.lifecycleScope.launch {
348â†’                            val apiResult = ApiResult(false, errorMessage)
349â†’                            val jsonEncodedString = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) { JSONObject.quote(apiResult.toString()) }
350â†’                            activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSttResult($jsonEncodedString)", null)
351â†’                        }
352â†’                    }
353â†’                }
354â†’                speechRecognizer.setRecognitionCallback(callback)
355â†’                convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.start())
356â†’            }
357â†’            "sttStop" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.stop())
358â†’            else -> {
359â†’                showDeveloperContact(ankiJsErrorCodeError, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
360â†’                throw Exception("unhandled request: $methodName")
361â†’            }
362â†’        }
363â†’    }
364â†’
365â†’    private fun processAction(
366â†’        action: () -> Boolean,
367â†’        apiContract: ApiContract,
368â†’        errorCode: Int,
369â†’        conversion: (ApiContract, Boolean) -> ByteArray
370â†’    ): ByteArray {
371â†’        val status = action()
372â†’        if (!status) {
373â†’            showDeveloperContact(errorCode, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
374â†’        }
375â†’        return conversion(apiContract, status)
376â†’    }
377â†’
378â†’    private suspend fun ankiSearchCardWithCallback(apiContract: ApiContract): ByteArray = withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
379â†’        val cards = try {
380â†’            searchForCards(apiContract.cardSuppliedData, SortOrder.UseCollectionOrdering(), CardsOrNotes.CARDS)
381â†’        } catch (exc: Exception) {
382â†’            activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript(
383â†’                "console.log('${context.getString(R.string.search_card_js_api_no_results)}')",
384â†’                null
385â†’            )
386â†’            showDeveloperContact(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeSearchCard, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
387â†’            return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
388â†’        }
389â†’        val searchResult: MutableList<String> = ArrayList()
390â†’        for (s in cards) {
391â†’            val jsonObject = JSONObject()
392â†’            val fieldsData = s.card.note(getColUnsafe).fields
393â†’            val fieldsName = s.card.model(getColUnsafe).fieldsNames
394â†’
395â†’            val noteId = s.card.nid
396â†’            val cardId = s.card.id
397â†’            jsonObject.put("cardId", cardId)
398â†’            jsonObject.put("noteId", noteId)
399â†’
400â†’            val jsonFieldObject = JSONObject()
401â†’            fieldsName.zip(fieldsData).forEach { pair ->
402â†’                jsonFieldObject.put(pair.component1(), pair.component2())
403â†’            }
404â†’            jsonObject.put("fieldsData", jsonFieldObject)
405â†’
406â†’            searchResult.add(jsonObject.toString())
407â†’        }
408â†’
409â†’        // quote result to prevent JSON injection attack
410â†’        val jsonEncodedString = JSONObject.quote(searchResult.toString())
411â†’        activity.runOnUiThread {
412â†’            activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSearchCard($jsonEncodedString)", null)
413â†’        }
414â†’        convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
415â†’    }
416â†’
417â†’    open class CardDataForJsApi {
418â†’        var newCardCount = ""
419â†’        var lrnCardCount = ""
420â†’        var revCardCount = ""
421â†’        var eta = -1
422â†’        var nextTime1 = ""
423â†’        var nextTime2 = ""
424â†’        var nextTime3 = ""
425â†’        var nextTime4 = ""
426â†’    }
427â†’
428â†’    class ApiResult(private val status: Boolean, private val value: String) {
429â†’        override fun toString(): String {
430â†’            return JSONObject().apply {
431â†’                put("success", status)
432â†’                put("value", value)
433â†’            }.toString()
434â†’        }
435â†’    }
436â†’
437â†’    class ApiContract(val isValid: Boolean, val cardSuppliedDeveloperContact: String, val cardSuppliedData: String)
438â†’}
439â†’

content.thinking:
**Changing ApiResult to store typed values**

ApiResult's value field currently forces strings, causing JSON values like booleans and numbers to be stored as strings. I'm updating ApiResult to accept Any? so it can hold properly typed values and adjusting convertToByteArray to pass actual types instead of always calling toString. This ensures correct JSON serialization of booleans, ints, and longs without unwanted string conversion.**Starting ApiResult type update**

I'm moving forward with changing ApiResult to use Any for its value and will update all constructors expecting strings accordingly.

content.text:
Summary:
- Updated AnkiDroidJsAPI to preserve numeric/boolean types in API responses by passing primitives directly into ApiResult.
- Changed ApiResult to accept any value type so JSON output keeps correct types instead of stringifying.

Tests: Not run (not requested).

 92â†’    }

 98â†’     */
 99â†’    private fun parseJsApiContract(byteArray: ByteArray): ApiContract? {
100â†’        try {
101â†’            val data = JSONObject(byteArray.decodeToString())
102â†’            val cardSuppliedApiVersion = data.optString("version", "")
103â†’            val cardSuppliedDeveloperContact = data.optString("developer", "")
104â†’            val cardSuppliedData = data.optString("data", "")
105â†’            val isValid = requireApiVersion(cardSuppliedApiVersion, cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
106â†’            return ApiContract(isValid, cardSuppliedDeveloperContact, cardSuppliedData)
107â†’        } catch (j: JSONException) {
108â†’            Timber.w(j)
109â†’            activity.runOnUiThread {

111â†’            }

114â†’    }
115â†’

147â†’            val versionCurrent = Version.parse(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.sCurrentJsApiVersion)
148â†’            val versionSupplied = Version.parse(apiVer)
149â†’
150â†’            /*

152â†’            * show toast for update and contact developer if need updates

158â†’                }

171â†’            }

365â†’    private fun processAction(
366â†’        action: () -> Boolean,
367â†’        apiContract: ApiContract,
368â†’        errorCode: Int,
369â†’        conversion: (ApiContract, Boolean) -> ByteArray
370â†’    ): ByteArray {
371â†’        val status = action()
372â†’        if (!status) {
373â†’            showDeveloperContact(errorCode, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
374â†’        }
375â†’        return conversion(apiContract, status)
376â†’    }

378â†’    private suspend fun ankiSearchCardWithCallback(apiContract: ApiContract): ByteArray = withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
379â†’        val cards = try {
380â†’            searchForCards(apiContract.cardSuppliedData, SortOrder.UseCollectionOrdering(), CardsOrNotes.CARDS)
381â†’        } catch (exc: Exception) {
382â†’            activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript(
383â†’                "console.log('${context.getString(R.string.search_card_js_api_no_results)}')",
384â†’                null
385â†’            )
386â†’            showDeveloperContact(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ankiJsErrorCodeSearchCard, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
387â†’            return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
388â†’        }
389â†’        val searchResult: MutableList<String> = ArrayList()
390â†’        for (s in cards) {
391â†’            val jsonObject = JSONObject()
392â†’            val fieldsData = s.card.note(getColUnsafe).fields
393â†’            val fieldsName = s.card.model(getColUnsafe).fieldsNames
394â†’
395â†’            val noteId = s.card.nid
396â†’            val cardId = s.card.id
397â†’            jsonObject.put("cardId", cardId)
398â†’            jsonObject.put("noteId", noteId)
399â†’
400â†’            val jsonFieldObject = JSONObject()
401â†’            fieldsName.zip(fieldsData).forEach { pair ->
402â†’                jsonFieldObject.put(pair.component1(), pair.component2())
403â†’            }
404â†’            jsonObject.put("fieldsData", jsonFieldObject)
405â†’
406â†’            searchResult.add(jsonObject.toString())
407â†’        }
408â†’
409â†’        // quote result to prevent JSON injection attack
410â†’        val jsonEncodedString = JSONObject.quote(searchResult.toString())
411â†’        activity.runOnUiThread {
412â†’            activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSearchCard($jsonEncodedString)", null)
413â†’        }
414â†’        convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
415â†’    }
